hotspots.name: Strait of Hormuz
hotspots.summary: Shipping chokepoint risk remains elevated with periodic military signaling and tanker route uncertainty.
couldAffect: Brent and WTI crude volatility from disruption headlines
Higher tanker insurance and freight rates
Inflation-sensitive equity sectors and airline margins
USD and regional currency safe-haven flows

hotspots.name: Bab el-Mandeb / Red Sea
hotspots.summary: Attacks and rerouting pressure continue to affect transit through one of the world’s key maritime corridors.
couldAffect: Container transit times between Asia and Europe
Delivery schedules for consumer and industrial imports
Fuel and freight components in producer prices
Shipping, retail, and logistics stock sentiment

hotspots.name: Taiwan Strait
hotspots.summary: Military activity and political signaling create periodic uncertainty around semiconductor and maritime flows.
couldAffect: Advanced chip supply chain confidence and lead times
Tech hardware production planning
Defense spending expectations across allies
Nasdaq and global mega-cap tech risk premium

hotspots.name: South China Sea
hotspots.summary: Territorial disputes and patrol incidents remain a latent catalyst for trade route and insurance risk repricing.
couldAffect: Regional shipping lane reliability and premiums
Electronics and component sourcing timetables
Asia FX volatility around escalation events
Port throughput sensitivity in regional hubs

hotspots.name: Black Sea / Grain Corridor
hotspots.summary: Conflict-adjacent logistics and export security continue to shape agriculture and bulk shipping expectations.
couldAffect: Wheat and corn benchmark sensitivity
Bulk carrier route and insurance conditions
Food importer currency stress in emerging markets
Input-cost outlook for global consumer staples

hotspots.name: Israel-Lebanon Border
hotspots.summary: Cross-border exchanges remain a fast-moving escalation channel with spillover implications for regional energy risk.
couldAffect: Regional gas infrastructure risk assessments
Defense procurement and contractor order narratives
Risk-off demand for safe-haven currencies
Middle East sovereign spread expectations

hotspots.name: Sahel Stability Belt
hotspots.summary: Political instability and security disruptions in the Sahel can pressure mining, transit corridors, and commodity-adjacent logistics.
couldAffect: Mining and resource project timelines
Regional fuel and staple transport costs
Frontier-market risk premiums
Multinational operating risk assumptions
